baseImage.prompt: Placeholder only for schema compatibility. Use imagePack frames for the Nano Banana 2 12-panel director storyboard.

music.prompt: Accepted Switchlight audio. Do not regenerate music from this storyboard config.

frames.name: panel-01-mirror-before-the-switch
frames.prompt: Make a horizontal 16:9 hand-drawn director storyboard panel for a fictional K-pop group music video. Use the reference images only to preserve the five LUMINA member identities. Panel 1: 'Back door, heartbeat, mirror light.' Wide dressing-room establishing shot. Rae is the calm center at the mirror; Jia, Sena, Nari, and Yumi appear as reflections and background figures. Add production-board annotations like the example: red body movement arrows, blue camera slow push, orange dim pearl bulb lighting, green mirror-depth framing, purple contained-nerves emotion note. Pencil sketch with selective colored notes, not photoreal. No real celebrity likeness, copied choreography, logos, captions in the scene, products, or beauty ad language.

frames.name: panel-02-chrome-sleeve-first-spark
frames.prompt: Make Panel 2 as a horizontal 16:9 pencil-and-marker director storyboard. Keep Jia, Rae, and Nari recognizable from the references. Lyric: 'Chrome on my sleeve like a satellite.' Jia snaps or adjusts a chrome jacket in a medium shot. Rae stays visible in mirror depth; Nari warms up behind. Add red jacket-motion arrows, blue handheld drift note, orange chrome side-light note, green foreground/mirror/background composition note, purple attitude-begins note. No real celebrity likeness, copied choreography, logos, scene captions, products, or beauty ad language.

frames.name: panel-03-one-breath-room-shines
frames.prompt: Make Panel 3 as a horizontal 16:9 hand-drawn director storyboard. Preserve all five fictional LUMINA members from the references. Lyric: 'One breath, then the whole room shines.' All five pause in the dressing room and turn toward a glowing doorway as pearl bulbs switch on in sequence. Add red group-pivot arrows, blue camera-widens note, orange sequential light arrows, green doorway-path composition note, purple readiness emotion note. Pencil sketch production-board style with dense annotations. No real celebrity likeness, copied choreography, logos, scene captions, products, or beauty ad language.
